why: Protocol 775 Configuration finish_configuration must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id in both directions using the official framed packet ids and body bytes generated by the oracle answer; the official packet INSTANCE terminal flags are recorded in the same answer artifact.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 3, official empty body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Configuration table has no mapping for packet id 0x03.
stop_condition: bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
